name: event-planner-crm-server
description: Event Planner CRM Server - Express.js API with PostgreSQL

scripts.build: node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process');const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');console.log('=== Starting TypeScript compilation ===');console.log('Working directory:', process.cwd());console.log('tsconfig.json exists:', fs.existsSync('tsconfig.json'));console.log('src/index.ts exists:', fs.existsSync('src/index.ts'));try{console.log('Running: tsc --pretty');execSync('tsc --pretty',{encoding:'utf8',stdio:'inherit',cwd:process.cwd()});console.log('=== TypeScript compilation complete ===');}catch(e){console.error('❌ TypeScript compilation failed with exit code:', e.status || 'unknown');if(e.stdout)console.log('stdout:', e.stdout);if(e.stderr)console.error('stderr:', e.stderr);process.exit(1);}const distPath=path.join('dist');if(!fs.existsSync(distPath)){console.error('❌ ERROR: dist directory not created');process.exit(1);}const files=fs.readdirSync(distPath);console.log('✅ dist directory exists');console.log('Files in dist:', files.slice(0,20).join(', '));const indexPath=path.join(distPath,'index.js');if(!fs.existsSync(indexPath)){console.error('❌ ERROR: dist/index.js not found after compilation');console.log('Available files:', files);process.exit(1);}const stats=fs.statSync(indexPath);console.log('✅ dist/index.js found, size:', stats.size, 'bytes');"

author: Event Planner CRM Team
